course/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.5 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.
Update the Maven Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
Add Spring Data JPA starter dependency to enable JPA repository support.
Add H2 in-memory database dependency for runtime data persistence.

.gitignore.general_idea: Replaced a minimal, likely Eclipse-centric .gitignore with a comprehensive standard template covering Maven, STS, IntelliJ, NetBeans, VS Code, and environment files.
.gitignore.human_impl: Replaced content with standard Spring Initializr/Maven .gitignore template

course/src/main/resources/application.pr.general_idea: Activate the test profile to ensure the application runs with test-specific configurations.
Enable the Open Session In View pattern to allow lazy loading outside of transactional boundaries.
